A piece of scarlet thread seems to have been a regular recognised token (Genesis 38:28, 30; Song of Solomon 4:3). Possibly it was a commitment token (sometimes a love token), worn round the neck (compare Genesis 38:18). ‘That you will save alive my father, and my mother, and my brothers, and my sisters, and all that they have, and will deliver our lives from death.’ They would recognise that any…
